title: My Father Wants to Age in Place. AI Will Be Watching
description: Devices that monitor seniors for safety are appealing to worried loved ones and underresourced home care agencies.

title: Facebook’s new AI Mode search gets its info from public posts
description: Would you trust AI suggestions from Facebook posts?

title: ‘Apocalypse’ History-Series Turns To AI For Season On Roman Empire
description: ‘Apocalypse’ History Series Turns To AI To Create Feel Of Archive Footage For Season Exploring Birth Of Roman Empire

title: TDK Ventures Announces Strategic Investment in Aston Power to Accelerate Reliable Power for AI Data Centers
description: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--TDK Corporation (TSE:6762) has announced that its corporate venture capital arm, TDK Ventures, Inc., has invested in Aston Power, a Raleigh-based startup specializing in rapid-deployment of clean and reliable energy for large industrial power users. This strategic partnership aims to solve the critical "time-to-power" bottleneck that currently limits the expansion of the global AI economy.
